nether_time.title: Spend time in the Nether to raise the Manifestation meter above 100 — watch for Scarlet Cultists

manifestor_appears.title: Observe the Manifestor appear in the Overworld (Scarlet King at Manifestation 100+)

subtitle.text: It does not attack. It offers. What it offers: the idea that your way is the right way.

description: The Manifestor is not a creature.
It is an idea that achieves physical presence.
Spend time in the Nether → the Manifestation meter rises.
Scarlet Cultists spawn on the surface, chanting → it accelerates.
At 100+ Manifestation → the Manifestor appears in the Overworld.
What it offers: the idea that your power should be the power.
That unification under your will is the same as peace.
You must use it. The Cursed Eye recipe requires the Scarlet Crown.
This is the FMA mechanic. You knew this was coming.
Every Nether portal you opened contributed to this.
→ Raise Manifestation above 100 (spend time in the Nether) [check]
→ Observe the Manifestor appear in the Overworld [check]
